summary: Created `src/signals/locale-signals.ts` with the `LocaleSignals` interface and `collectLocaleSignals()` function that collects timezone (via Intl.DateTimeFormat), languages (via navigator.languages/language), platform (via navigator.platform), and doNotTrack (via navigator.doNotTrack/globalThis.doNotTrack) with safe fallback strings for unsupported APIs. Updated the test file to import from the source module instead of using an inline implementation, and adjusted `tests/tsconfig.json` to support cross-directory imports. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 69 tests).
